pulseRed.description: Pulse Red — primary accent. The Curse pulses red. Used for badges, headings, anomaly indicators.

voidBlack.description: Void Black — base background for banners, social previews, dark-theme surfaces.

vascularMaroon.description: Vascular Maroon — deep accent. Vines, shadows, hover states. Always recedes.

usage.badges: Prefer Pulse Red for status badges where shields.io accepts a hex color. Black + maroon are reserved for imagery, not badges.
usage.imagery: Black backgrounds, red linework, occasional maroon glow. Neural webs, vines, clock-face motifs.
doNotUse: Bright accent colors outside the palette (no green, blue, yellow).
Pastel variations of the three core hues.
Pulse Red as a wash — it is an accent, not a fill.
